sections.heading: ANNEX II
sections.description: Instructions for reporting on own funds and own funds requirements.

sections.heading: PART II: TEMPLATE RELATED INSTRUCTIONS
sections.description: Instructions related to specific reporting templates.

sections.heading: Counterparty Credit Risk
sections.description: Overview of counterparty credit risk templates and their scope.

sections.heading: C 34.01 - Size of the derivative business
sections.description: Reports on the size of the derivative business and compliance with thresholds.

sections.heading: C 34.02 - CCR exposures by approach
sections.description: Reports CCR exposures separately for all approaches.

sections.heading: C 34.03 - CCR exposures treated with standardised approaches: SA-CCR and Simplified SA-CCR
sections.description: Reports CCR exposures calculated with SA-CCR or Simplified SA-CCR.

sections.heading: C 34.04 - CCR exposures treated with the Original Exposure Method (OEM)
sections.description: Reports CCR exposures calculated using the Original Exposure Method.

sections.heading: C 34.05 – CCR exposures treated with the Internal Model Method (IMM)
sections.description: Reports CCR exposures calculated using the Internal Model Method.

sections.heading: C 34.06 – Top twenty counterparties
sections.description: Reports information on the top 20 counterparties with highest CCR exposures.

sections.heading: C 34.07 - IRB approach – CCR exposures by exposure class and PD scale
sections.description: Reports CCR exposures using the IRB approach by exposure class and PD scale.

sections.heading: C 34.08 - Composition of collateral for CCR exposures
sections.description: Reports fair values of collateral used in CCR exposures.

sections.heading: C 34.09 - Credit derivatives exposures
sections.description: Reports on credit derivative protection bought or sold.

sections.heading: C 34.10 - Exposures to CCPs
sections.description: Reports information on exposures to central counterparties.

sections.heading: C 34.11 - Risk weighted exposure amounts (RWEA) flow statements of CCR exposures under the IMM
sections.description: Reports flow statements explaining changes in RWEA of CCR exposures under the IMM.

C 34.01.name: C 34.01 - Size of the derivative business
C 34.01.description: Reports the size of the derivative business and compliance with thresholds.
C 34.01.section_heading: C 34.01 - Size of the derivative business

C 34.02.name: C 34.02 - CCR exposures by approach
C 34.02.description: Reports CCR exposures separately for all CCR exposures and for all CCR exposures excluding exposures to central counterparties.

C 34.03.name: C 34.03 - CCR exposures treated with standardised approaches: SA-CCR and Simplified SA-CCR
C 34.03.description: Reports CCR exposures calculated with the SA-CCR or the Simplified SA-CCR.
C 34.03.section_heading: C 34.03 - CCR exposures treated with standardised approaches: SA-CCR and Simplified SA-CCR

C 34.04.name: C 34.04 - CCR exposures treated with the Original Exposure Method (OEM)
C 34.04.description: Reports CCR exposures calculated using the Original Exposure Method.
C 34.04.section_heading: C 34.04 - CCR exposures treated with the Original Exposure Method (OEM)

C 34.05.name: C 34.05 – CCR exposures treated with the Internal Model Method (IMM)
C 34.05.description: Reports CCR exposures calculated using the Internal Model Method.
C 34.05.section_heading: C 34.05 – CCR exposures treated with the Internal Model Method (IMM)

C 34.06.name: C 34.06 – Top twenty counterparties
C 34.06.description: Reports information on the top 20 counterparties with highest CCR exposures.

C 34.07.name: C 34.07 - IRB approach – CCR exposures by exposure class and PD scale
C 34.07.description: Reports CCR exposures using the IRB approach by exposure class and PD scale.
C 34.07.section_heading: C 34.07 - IRB approach – CCR exposures by exposure class and PD scale

C 34.08.name: C 34.08 - Composition of collateral for CCR exposures
C 34.08.description: Reports fair values of collateral used in CCR exposures.
C 34.08.section_heading: C 34.08 - Composition of collateral for CCR exposures

C 34.09.name: C 34.09 - Credit derivatives exposures
C 34.09.description: Reports on credit derivative protection bought or sold.

C 34.10.name: C 34.10 - Exposures to CCPs
C 34.10.description: Reports information on exposures to central counterparties.

C 34.11.name: C 34.11 - Risk weighted exposure amounts (RWEA) flow statements of CCR exposures under the IMM
C 34.11.description: Reports flow statements explaining changes in RWEA of CCR exposures under the IMM.
C 34.11.section_heading: C 34.11 - Risk weighted exposure amounts (RWEA) flow statements of CCR exposures under the IMM
